generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: slider
Description: slider is a slider UI component from the parkui corpus. It provides reusable other behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: 
Interactions: 
Tags: other, parkui, slider

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/ui/slider.tsx
'use client'
import { ark } from '@ark-ui/react/factory'
import { Slider, useSliderContext } from '@ark-ui/react/slider'
import { type ComponentProps, forwardRef } from 'react'
import { createStyleContext } from 'styled-system/jsx'
import { slider } from 'styled-system/recipes'

const { withProvider, withContext } = createStyleContext(slider)

export const Root = withProvider(Slider.Root, 'root')
export const Control = withContext(Slider.Control, 'control')
export
